description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with a brand patch appliquéd on the right sleeve, blue fabric tape detailing on in-seam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest and print on the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry Use warm iron; do not iron on decorations Set your steps on fire with this graphic print T-shirt from puma. Graffiti gives you a fashionable look while you chill out in this pure cotton tee - pair it with denims and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is of size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
